title: Whiphid (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Whiphid''' was the native language of the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] species from [[Toola/Legends|Toola]]. It was formed of snorts, growls, and bellowing barks.

There was no written form of Whiphid language. The language's working vocabulary was limited to eight thousand words.

Most Whiphids were only fluent in Whiphid, but not in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].

{{Language-stub}}

==Glossary of terms==
*''Mazlot'' - airlock<ref name="Red Harvest">[[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']]</ref>
*''Muphrida'' - Large disgusting creature
